title: Rescue Order Arrives
intendedTensionBeat: One puppy is closer to water while the safer puppy looks easier.
intendedReleaseBeat: Saving the urgent puppy first makes the second rescue feel controlled.
expectedPath: Rescue the lower or water-near puppy first, then pivot to the safer puppy.
expectedFailMode: Player saves the visually easier puppy first and loses tempo on the urgent rescue.
designNotes: This is the key early identity level. The wrong choice must be tempting, but the lesson must be readable.
